title: AXMapData
description: Represents a collection of map data including markers, polygons, and POI markers.

props.name: markers
props.description: Array of markers to be displayed on the map.

props.name: polygons
props.description: Array of polygons to be displayed on the map.

props.name: pois
props.description: Array of POI markers to be displayed on the map.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: TypeScript interface definition for map data collection.
